reply.text: This looks less transport more album cover where are the tour dates

messages.text: Relax groupie this tour is invite only
Wild because I already scalped front row in my head
Imaginary tickets fit your imaginary rizz
Plot twist my rizz is standing right across the aisle
Please you would trip walking over
ill fall but it will be into your close friends list
Bold to assume you make the roster
You are persistent, I will give that
Cool ill just come with director cut energy then
Director could never with that caption energy
Caption was the trailer full movie clearly on this story
Movie budget is high you sure 😭😭
I stay in pre sale mode I can keep up
Talk is cheap tickets are not babe
Then let me buy drinks and we call it merch
